strengths: The memo clearly identifies the policy controls that matter before the vendor upload can proceed.
The recommendation is practical and appropriately grounded in the supplied scenario instead of external legal citations.
weaknesses: The Required Safeguards section should be more execution-ready by assigning each safeguard to a concrete owner such as the business owner, data steward, vendor manager, or legal/privacy reviewer.
The memo should distinguish pre-approval blockers from post-approval operating controls so the business owner can see what must happen before any upload.
The Open Questions section should include a sharper question about whether the vendor portal terms permit retention, secondary use, or model training by default.
notes:
> Optional notes for yourself or future audit context.

Simulated reviewer note for the checkpoint example. This review intentionally leaves actionable weaknesses so the package demonstrates resume-and-continue behavior.
